song_name: Espresso - Is It Over Now - Please Please Please
version_description: Eras tour New Orleans night 3 acoustic set mashup with Sabrina Carpenter.

performance.name: Eras Tour NOLA night 3
performance.comment: Sabrina Carpenter joined Taylor Swift for a mash-up during the acoustic set of the eras tour on night 3 in new orleans

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[tab]Taylor plays a simplified version of some chords that makes it easier to go between chords

D |--3-----2-----0------2------|
A |--0-----3-----2------0------|
E |--0-----0-----3------0------|[/tab]
